onboarding.step1Sub: Join thousands who pray the Rosary every day — together, across the world.
onboarding.step2Sub: See real-time prayer on a live world map. Every rosary lights up a candle.
onboarding.step3Sub: Share intentions, pray for others, and let the world carry you in prayer.

intentions.placeholder: What would you like others to pray for?

intentions.noMyIntentions: You haven't shared any intentions yet.
intentions.bibleQuote: "Bear one another's burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ."

profile.noPrayers: No prayers yet. Start your first rosary!
profile.padrepio: "Pray, hope and don't worry. Worry is useless. God is merciful and will hear your prayer."

healing.title: Healing & Deliverance
healing.subtitle: A spiritual path out of distraction, addiction, and inner unrest — through prayer into Christ.
healing.sosSubtitle: The Jesus Prayer — alone or together with someone.
healing.noProgramsYet: No paths available yet. Content is being prepared with priests.
healing.dayNotAvailable: This day is not yet available.

sos.title: The Jesus Prayer
sos.intro: Jesus Christ is closer than your breath. You do not have to fight alone.
sos.withPartnerSubtitle: An anonymous companion from the prayer pool.
sos.aloneSubtitle: 33× the Jesus Prayer, in rhythm with your breath.
sos.noPartnerAvailable: No one is in the prayer partner pool right now. You can pray alone — and join the pool yourself under Settings → Prayer Partner Pool.
sos.prayingAlone: You are praying — the Lord is with you.
sos.jesusPrayerText: Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me.
